title: StadiumIQ
subtitle: FIFA World Cup 2026 Smart Stadium & Operations
welcome_desc: Your smart companion for stadium routing, match schedules, facilities, and live tournament safety regulations.
input_placeholder: Ask about schedules, gate density, restrooms, rules...
suggested_1: When is United States vs Paraguay playing?
suggested_2: Which is the least crowded gate?
suggested_3: Where is the nearest restroom or ADA access?
suggested_4: What are the rules for extra time and penalties?
live_feed_empty: No active operational alerts. Monitoring live channels...
resources_rules_desc: Prohibited items include pyrotechnics, weapons, aerosol cans, large bags exceeding 35x35x35cm, professional recording equipment, commercial signs, laser pointers, and glass/metal containers. Permitted items include standard personal compact umbrellas, medically necessary equipment, and transparent water bottles up to 1L. Ticket holders are subject to security screening. Re-entry is strictly prohibited. Smoking, vaping, and electronic cigarettes are banned throughout the stadium grounds.
resources_acc_desc: All matches feature sensory-friendly rooms, quiet reflection zones, stroller check-in hubs, and dedicated companion seating rows across every tier. Compliant ADA-accessible pathways run directly from designated public transit drops and parking zones to specialized fast-track entry gates. Assistive Listening Devices (ALDs) and detailed tactile braille maps are available upon request at any primary Guest Services desk.
